title: Changing Monday TLV sign color
excerpt: This might be one of the strangest questions you’ve come across, but I saw a TikTok video where someone changed the color of the sign on the Monday TLV building using an app. The app looked authentic and matched Monday’s…

posts.author: Meirkadosh (Meir)
posts.cookedHtml:
This might be one of the strangest questions you’ve come across, but I saw a TikTok video where someone changed the color of the sign on the Monday TLV building using an app. The app looked authentic and matched Monday’s branding and themes, but I’ve looked through Monday’s app and can’t find this feature. Does anyone know how this is done?

IMG_54631284×2193 329 KB

posts.author: GeorgeBaker (George Baker)
posts.cookedHtml: My best guess is CGI, as I’m not sure they would allow people to just… Change the color of their building

posts.author: aaroil3 (Aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: https://mondaysign.com/

posts.author: Livnelessner (Livne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I found the page

mondaysign.com
